tasks.name: Select the cheapest work-from-home starter plan under $150 with 1-on-1 coaching and 5+ modules
tasks.description: From the pricing section, find starter plans under $150 that include 1-on-1 coaching and at least 5 training modules, then select the cheapest qualifying plan and begin the sign-up process with your contact details entered.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "Plans & Pricing."
On the pricing page, locate the price filter and enter "150" in the maximum price field.
In the features filter panel, check the box for "Includes 1-on-1 Coaching" and in the "Training modules" filter select the option "5+ modules."
Click on the sort dropdown and choose "Price – Low to High" to sort the qualifying plans.
From the filtered and sorted list, click on the first plan card (the cheapest plan that meets all criteria).
On the selected plan’s detail page, click the primary button labeled "Get Started with This Plan."
On the sign-up form that appears, leave the preselected plan unchanged, type "Alex Rivera" into the Name field, and type "alex@example.com" into the Email field.
Scroll to the bottom of the form and click the "Continue" button to proceed with this plan.

tasks.name: Register for the earliest evening intro webinar within the next 14 days
tasks.description: Find an introductory work-from-home overview webinar scheduled on a weekday evening (6pm–9pm) within the next 14 days, and complete the on-site registration form for the earliest available option.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the top navigation item or hero button labeled "Free Webinar" or "Webinars."
On the webinars listing page, use the date filter to select the range "Next 14 days."
Use the time-of-day filter to select "Evening (6pm–9pm)."
In the topic or type filter, select the option labeled "Introductory Overview" or "Getting Started Overview."
Click the sort dropdown and choose "Earliest date first" so the soonest webinar appears at the top.
From the filtered list, click on the first webinar card to open its detail page.
On the webinar detail page, click the button labeled "Reserve my spot" or "Register now."

On the registration form, enter "Pat Morgan" in the Name field, "pat@example.com" in the Email field, select "Eastern Time (ET)" from the Time Zone dropdown, choose "Email only" in the Reminder Preference section, and click the "Submit Registration" button.

tasks.name: Create and save an earnings plan targeting at least $2,000/month using the calculator
tasks.description: Open the earnings calculator, input specific values for hours per week, average sale value, monthly leads, and conversion rate, then calculate and save a plan configured to aim for at least $2,000 in estimated monthly income.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Scroll down until you reach the section labeled "Earnings Calculator" and click the button or link labeled "Open full calculator."
In the "Hours per week" slider control, drag the handle or type to set the value to "20" hours.
In the "Average sale value" input field, type "200" as the dollar amount.
In the "Monthly leads" input field, type "50" as the number of leads.
In the "Conversion rate" slider or dropdown, set the value to "20%".
Click the button labeled "Calculate my monthly income" to generate the estimated earnings.
Below the result, click the button labeled "Save this earnings plan" or "Save my estimate."
In the save form or popup, type "Jordan Lee" in the Name field, "planner@example.com" in the Email field, and then click the button labeled "Save plan to my account" or "Save estimate."

tasks.name: Choose the highest-earning program requiring under 10 hours/week with 3+ live sessions
tasks.description: From the programs section, filter for work-from-home business tracks that require up to 10 hours per week and include at least 3 live group sessions per month, then select and favorite the program with the highest listed average monthly earnings and create a basic account to save it.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "Programs" or "Business Tracks."
On the programs page, locate the "Time commitment" filter and select the option "Up to 10 hours/week."
In the filters section, check the box for "Includes live group sessions" and in the "Live sessions per month" filter select "3 or more."
Click the sort dropdown and choose "Average monthly earnings – High to Low" to see the most lucrative qualifying programs first.
From the filtered and sorted program list, click the first program card at the top of the list.
On the program detail page, click the button labeled "Add to Favorites" or "Save this program."
When the sign-up popup appears, click "Create account" or "Sign up to save."
On the account creation form, enter "Riley Chen" in the Name field, "riley@example.com" in the Email field, type "DemoPass123" into the Password field, and click the "Create free account" button.

tasks.name: Save the most recent success story of a parent earning $2,500+ per month working 20–30 hours/week
tasks.description: Browse success stories and filter to find parents who work 20–30 hours per week and earn at least $2,500 per month, then open the most recent story and save it to a reading list using the guest option.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the top navigation link labeled "Success Stories" or "Testimonials."
On the success stories page, use the "Lifestyle" filter to select "Parents."
Adjust the "Monthly earnings" slider or filter so the minimum value is set to "$2500".
In the "Hours worked per week" filter, choose the range option labeled "20–30 hours."
Click the sort dropdown and select "Most recent" so the newest stories appear first.
From the filtered list, click on the first story card at the top.
On the story detail page, click the button labeled "Save to reading list" or "Bookmark this story."
In the sign-in or save popup, choose the option labeled "Continue as guest," type "reader@example.com" into the Email field, and click the "Save story" button.

tasks.name: Submit a part-time application with a $300 monthly budget starting April 1, 2026
tasks.description: Open the application form from the landing page, select a part-time availability option, set a maximum monthly budget of $300, choose April 1, 2026 as the preferred start date, pick exactly two interest areas, and submit the completed application.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the primary call-to-action button in the hero area labeled "Apply Now" or "Get Started."
On the application page, in the "Availability" options, select "Part-time (10–20 hours/week)."
In the "Monthly budget" slider or input field, drag the slider or type so the budget is set to "$300".
In the "Preferred start date" dropdown or date picker, select "April 1, 2026" as the start date.
In the "Areas of interest" section, check exactly two checkboxes: "Email Marketing" and "Affiliate Sales."
In the contact information section, type "Taylor Morgan" into the Full Name field, "taylor@example.com" into the Email field, and "5551237890" into the Phone field.
In the "Biggest goal" or "Tell us about your goals" textarea, type the sentence "I want to replace at least half of my current income within 12 months."
Check the box labeled "I agree to the Terms & Conditions" and click the "Submit application" button.

tasks.name: Subscribe to a weekly newsletter focused on Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy
tasks.description: Access the newsletter preferences page from the footer, configure a weekly frequency with morning delivery, select only Email Marketing and Social Media Strategy topics, adjust content type settings, and submit the subscription form.
steps: From any page on the site, scroll down to the footer and click the link labeled "Newsletter" or "Newsletter Preferences."
On the newsletter settings page, in the "Frequency" section, select the option "Weekly summary."
In the "Topics" list, uncheck any topics that are already selected so no topics remain selected.
Then, in the same "Topics" list, check exactly two topics: "Email Marketing" and "Social Media Strategy."
In the "Best time to receive emails" dropdown, select "Morning (8am–10am)."
In the Email field, type "subscriber@example.com".
In the First Name field, type "Morgan".
In the "Content type" settings, check the box for "Tips & Tutorials" and uncheck the box for "Product Announcements."
Click the button labeled "Subscribe to newsletter" to save these preferences.

tasks.name: Ask support about extending the 30-day money-back guarantee to 60 days
tasks.description: Use the FAQ search to find the refund policy that mentions a 30-day money-back guarantee, then open the contact form from that section and send a billing-related question requesting a 60-day guarantee, including your name and email.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation link labeled "FAQ" or "Help Center."
On the FAQ page, click into the search bar, type "refund" and press Enter or click the search icon.
From the search results, click the question titled "What is your 30-day money-back guarantee?" or the closest match that mentions "30-day money-back guarantee."
Below the answer text, click the link or button labeled "Still need help? Contact support" or "Contact us."
On the contact form page, open the "Topic" dropdown and select "Billing & Refunds."
In the "Subject" field, type "Question about extending 30-day guarantee."

In the main "Message" textarea, type the following text: "I see that you offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Is it possible to extend this guarantee to 60 days for the work-from-home program I am considering?"
Fill in the Name field with "Jamie Lee", the Email field with "jamie@example.com", and then click the "Send message" button.
